stories.title: Follow live: Germany and Paraguay battling in extr...
Sources: Grizzlies trading star Morant to Blazers
stories.summary: The Memphis Grizzlies are trading two-time All-Star Ja Morant to the Portland Trail Blazers for Jerami Grant and Kris Murray, sources told ESPN.

stories.title: Lions release Arnold after CB's bond set at $1M
stories.summary: The Lions have released Terrion Arnold after he was arrested last week on felony charges of armed robbery and kidnapping, the team announced Monday.

stories.title: Sources: Warriors eyeing LeBron, AD reunion
stories.summary: The Warriors are prepared to pursue a reunion of LeBron James and Anthony Davis in Golden State, with Draymond Green declining his player option to open up the flexibility for such a possibility, league sources told ESPN.

stories.title: Ex-Titans, Cards RB Johnson says he has ALS
stories.summary: Former Titans and Cardinals running back Chris Johnson told "Good Morning America" that he was diagnosed with ALS in 2025.
